tests.name: AnthropicJudgeBackend exposes .name = 'anthropic'
AnthropicJudgeBackend accepts model / maxTurns / perAttemptTimeoutMs / retrySchedule opts without throwing
AnthropicJudgeBackend returns pass=true on a clean structured verdict
AnthropicJudgeBackend falls back to text result + JSON.parse when structured_output missing
